# Vendored: littlefs

- Upstream: https://github.com/littlefs-project/littlefs
- Version: **v2.11.3**
- Commit: `6cb4e86540eca0d9ba62500a298385c9d863c8be`
- Vendored files: `lfs.c`, `lfs.h`, `lfs_util.c`, `lfs_util.h`, `LICENSE.md`

Unmodified upstream sources. To update, copy the same files from the desired
release tag and update this file. Build configuration (e.g. `LFS_NO_MALLOC`,
`LFS_NO_DEBUG`) is supplied via compile definitions in `CMakeLists.txt`, not by
editing these files.
